The '''Super Transport XI''' was a colossal container ship built by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].

==Characteristics==
Their twenty cavernous holds could carry 40,000 standardized containers, for a total of 10 million cubic meters or 25 million metric tons worth of cargo. With the bulkheads between the holds removed, it could easily fit three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]]. This great capacity, equivalent to hundreds of thousands of [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighters]], made the Super Transport XI a highly economical means of delivering cargo despite its slow speed.

==History==
As the gigantic ships were slow, unarmed, and even unshielded, it was suitable only for the safest spacelanes, and required heavy escort for protection from [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

Due to its huge cargo bays, a Super Transport XI could be converted into a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]], as was done by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] turned [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Lon Donell]].<ref name="WbC">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]</ref>

Three were present at the [[Bissillirus Resupply Base]] when it was [[Battle of Bissillirus]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Showdown" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Super Transport XI series was created for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.''
